description_long: This is a visibly aged and heavily stained floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern and a round bowl. The exterior surfaces are covered in dark grime and discoloration, especially around the base, bowl rim, and cistern edges, suggesting long-term neglect or exposure to harsh conditions. The toilet seat is present and raised, revealing a stained interior bowl with a pronounced water line. The cistern is boxy and sits directly above the bowl, with a flush lever visible on the left side. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, with sharp edges and a solid base. The object appears to be made primarily of ceramic, with some metal and plastic components for the seat and flush mechanism.
description: A dirty, floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern, raised seat, and visible grime and stains throughout. The flush lever is present on the cistern's side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular cistern, raised seat, and extensive grime along the base and bowl.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open, stained bowl, round seat, and flush lever on the left side of the cistern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cistern and bowl visible, showing less detail of the flush mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the cistern and base, with heavy discoloration and no visible bowl opening.
